mission.title: valkey: Investigate performance improvements related to slot ownership in getNodeByQuery
mission.description: Investigate performance improvements related to slot ownership in getNodeByQuery. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify valkey analyze symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your valkey installation:
```bash
valkey-server --version
valkey-cli ping
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review valkey configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant valkey configuration:
While playing around with profiling various workloads, I noticed that getNodeByQuery was quite slow, taking about 4% of the CPU of a given command.

resolution.summary:
Sorry for a bit of a delay. I chatted with Ping a bit offline, and I think we agreed that it's likely a better first step to optimize the access of the various cluster structures to have better cache locality. See [Code](https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey/blob/f2bbd1ff0f650182e7df1fda1055551389bb79c2/src/cluster_legacy.h#L326), but we basically want to replace:
